name: Hydrogen
role: Primary carrier/coolant; the base hydrogen stem cell of all atoms

name: Helium
role: Helium-3 is a primordial resonance store; lightest noble buffer

name: Lithium
role: Compressed Helium-3 storage; programmable base layer

name: Beryllium
role: Static-flashable preload base; low-Z neutron reflector

name: Boron
role: Neutron absorber; moderating layer in stack

name: Carbon
role: Graphite moderator; organic coupling bridge

name: Nitrogen
role: Atmospheric buffer; biological resonance carrier

name: Oxygen
role: Oxidation catalyst; water partner with hydrogen

name: Fluorine
role: Fluoride ion channel; high-electronegativity coupling

name: Neon
role: Discharge tube reference; period-2 noble buffer

name: Sodium
role: Ion channel mediator; salt bridge conductor

name: Magnesium
role: Chlorophyll center; biological energy transducer

name: Aluminum
role: RF shielding layer; lightweight frequency reflector

name: Silicon
role: Semiconductor base; quartz oscillator crystal

name: Phosphorus
role: Bioenergetic ATP bridge; phosphor luminescence

name: Sulfur
role: Vulcanization agent; sulfide frequency anchor

name: Chlorine
role: Ion channel gate; disinfection/purification

name: Argon
role: Inert purge gas; period-3 noble buffer

name: Potassium
role: Nerve/cell membrane gate; biological frequency key

name: Calcium
role: Bone/crystal matrix; structural resonance scaffold

name: Titanium
role: High-strength structural coupling; biocompatible interface

name: Chromium
role: Ruby dopant (Al2O3:Cr); lasing/lensing activator

name: Iron
role: Magnetic field anchor; core planetary resonance

name: Nickel
role: Hydrogen command center; 152:1 ratio base in nickel computer

name: Copper
role: Electrical conductor; hydrogen-inside-copper model

name: Zinc
role: Enzyme cofactor; biological frequency coupler

role: Semiconductor bridge; infrared optics layer

name: Selenium
role: Photovoltaic sensitizer; antioxidant cellular shield

name: Zirconium
role: Cladding material; low neutron absorption structural layer

name: Palladium
role: Hydrogen absorption catalyst; SLR weave core (46-47-48-49)

name: Silver
role: Wartime nickel alloy; 152:1 ratio stabilizer in nickel computer

name: Cadmium
role: Neutron absorber/damper; SLR weave modulator (46-47-48-49)

name: Indium
role: Containment skin; gasket seal; SLR weave (46-47-48-49) edge element

role: Solder/joining layer; low-melting structural bridge

role: Thyroid resonance element; iodine-131 tracer

role: Ferroelectric crystal base; high-density containment filler

name: Osmium
role: Densest element; ultra-hard alloy layer

name: Platinum
role: 78-element frequency/temperature gradient cap; catalytic converter

name: Gold
role: Fossilized circuit vein; 'turn-back-on' Earth grid node

name: Mercury
role: Liquid gold / phase mirror; Hg as frequency/temperature interface

name: Lead
role: Radiation shielding; chain end-stop in decay series

name: Polonium
role: Hydrogen well; radiation cage; 84-H gyroscope seed element

name: Radon
role: Period-6 noble end-cap; alpha-emission reference

role: Alpha source; luminescence activator in historical instruments

name: Uranium
role: Fissile core material; starting fuel in breeder chain
